/usr/bin/cc -rdynamic CMakeFiles/mosquitto_sub.dir/sub_client.c.o CMakeFiles/mosquitto_sub.dir/sub_client_output.c.o CMakeFiles/mosquitto_sub.dir/client_shared.c.o CMakeFiles/mosquitto_sub.dir/client_props.c.o -o mosquitto_sub   -L/home/sergey/Programming/Kemek/matrix/mosquitto-2.0.15/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sergey/Programming/Kemek/matrix/mosquitto-2.0.15/build/lib: ../lib/libmosquitto.so.2.0.15 -lssl -lcrypto -lpthread -lrt
